user_question: Хамгийн эхний зээлдэгчийн нэр болон огноог харуулна уу.
sql_query: SELECT customer_name, adv_date, adv_amount, cur_code, txn_date FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE adv_date IS NOT NULL AND adv_amount > 0 AND txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) ORDER BY adv_date ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;
notes: Historical query - no status filter needed. First borrower ever. -use global snapshot.

user_question: Хамгийн сүүлийн зээлдэгчийн нэр болон огноог харуулна уу.
sql_query: SELECT customer_name, adv_date, txn_date, acnt_code FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE adv_date IS NOT NULL AND customer_name IS NOT NULL AND adv_amount > 0 AND txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) ORDER BY adv_date DESC  FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY;
notes: Latest borrower by disbursement date. No status filter - shows most recent regardless of current status. -use global snapshot.

user_question: 123456789 дугаартай зээлийн дансны мэдээллийг харуулна уу.
sql_query: SELECT * FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE acnt_code = '123456789' AND txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL)
notes: Single account lookup - use global snapshot pattern.

user_question: Хамгийн сүүлийн хоёр зээлийн дансны мэдээллийг харуулна уу?
sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, acnt_name, customer_name, adv_date, adv_amount, cur_code, principal, status FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND adv_date IS NOT NULL AND adv_amount > 0 ORDER BY adv_date DESC FETCH FIRST 2 ROWS ONLY
notes: Latest 2 accounts by disbursement - use global snapshot, then order.

user_question: Хамгийн сүүлийн хоёр зээлдэгчийн нэрийг харуулна уу?
sql_query: SELECT customer_name, adv_date FROM (SELECT customer_name, adv_date, adv_amount, cur_code, principal, status, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_name ORDER BY adv_date DESC) as rn FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND customer_name IS NOT NULL AND adv_date IS NOT NULL AND adv_amount > 0) t WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY adv_date DESC FETCH FIRST 2 ROWS ONLY;
notes: Latest 2 CUSTOMERS (not accounts!) - need ROW_NUMBER to dedupe by customer_name, then limit.

user_question: 90 хоногоос дээш хугацаа хэтэрсэн үндсэн зээлийн өртэй бөгөөд эргэлзээтэй ангилалтай байгаа бүх зээлийн дансыг гаргаж өг.
sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, customer_name, class_name, due_princ_days, principal, cur_code, status FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND principal > 0 AND UPPER(class_name) LIKE '%ЭРГЭЛЗЭЭТЭЙ%' AND NVL(due_princ_days, 0) > 90 ORDER BY due_princ_days DESC;
notes: Current state query - use global snapshot with status='O'. Looking for CURRENTLY overdue loans.

user_question: 123456789 дансны зээлийн үлдэгдлийн мэдээллийг харуулна уу?
sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, customer_name, principal, cur_code, status, txn_date FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE acnt_code = '123456789' AND txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL)
notes: Single account balance lookup - global snapshot.

user_question: Сүүлийн 12 сарын хугацаанд шинээр олгосон зээлийн тоог мэдээлэлтэй нь хамт гаргаж өг
sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, acnt_name, customer_name, adv_date, adv_amount, cur_code, COUNT(*) OVER () AS total_new_loans FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND adv_date >= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MM'), -12) AND adv_date IS NOT NULL AND adv_amount > 0 ORDER BY adv_date DESC
notes: New loans in last 12 months - global snapshot, filter by adv_date range.

user_question: Ойрын 30 хоногт төлөх ёстой хамгийн их дүнтэй төлбөрийг олж өг
sql_query: WITH latest_version_cte AS (SELECT acnt_code, MAX(nrs_version) AS max_ver FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL GROUP BY acnt_code) SELECT t.acnt_code, t.customer_name, t.schd_date, t.amount, t.int_amount, (t.amount + t.int_amount) AS total_payment, t.cur_code FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL t JOIN latest_version_cte lv ON t.acnt_code = lv.acnt_code AND t.nrs_version = lv.max_ver WHERE t.status = 'O' AND t.schd_date BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 30 ORDER BY (t.amount + t.int_amount) DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
notes: Payment schedule query - always filter by latest nrs_version per account.

user_question: Төлбөрийн хуваарийн дагуу дараа долоо хоногт төлөгдөх зээлийн мэдээлэл
sql_query: WITH latest_version_cte AS (SELECT acnt_code, MAX(nrs_version) AS max_ver FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL GROUP BY acnt_code) SELECT t.acnt_code, t.customer_name, t.schd_date, t.amount, t.int_amount, t.cur_code FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL t JOIN latest_version_cte lv ON t.acnt_code = lv.acnt_code AND t.nrs_version = lv.max_ver WHERE t.status = 'O' AND t.schd_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7 AND t.schd_date < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 14 ORDER BY t.schd_date ASC
notes: Next week's payments - IW truncates to Monday of current week.

user_question: Ирэх долоо хоногт төлөгдөх зээлийн мэдээлэл
sql_query: WITH latest_version_cte AS (SELECT acnt_code, MAX(nrs_version) AS max_ver FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL GROUP BY acnt_code) SELECT t.acnt_code, t.customer_name, t.schd_date, t.amount, t.int_amount, t.cur_code FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL t JOIN latest_version_cte lv ON t.acnt_code = lv.acnt_code AND t.nrs_version = lv.max_ver WHERE t.status = 'O' AND t.schd_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7 AND t.schd_date < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 14 ORDER BY t.schd_date ASC
notes: Same as above - next week means Monday to Sunday of next week.

user_question: Ойрын долоо хоногт төлөгдөх зээлийн мэдээлэл
sql_query: WITH latest_version_cte AS (SELECT acnt_code, MAX(nrs_version) AS max_ver FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL GROUP BY acnt_code) SELECT t.acnt_code, t.customer_name, t.schd_date, t.amount, t.int_amount, t.cur_code FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL t JOIN latest_version_cte lv ON t.acnt_code = lv.acnt_code AND t.nrs_version = lv.max_ver WHERE t.status = 'O' AND t.schd_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND t.schd_date < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 7 ORDER BY t.schd_date ASC
notes: Next 7 days from today.

user_question: Энэ долоо хоногт төлөгдөх зээлийн мэдээлэл
sql_query: WITH latest_version_cte AS (SELECT acnt_code, MAX(nrs_version) AS max_ver FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL GROUP BY acnt_code) SELECT t.acnt_code, t.customer_name, t.schd_date, t.amount, t.int_amount, t.cur_code FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL t JOIN latest_version_cte lv ON t.acnt_code = lv.acnt_code AND t.nrs_version = lv.max_ver WHERE t.status = 'O' AND t.schd_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') AND t.schd_date < TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'IW') + 7 ORDER BY t.schd_date ASC

user_question: Ирэх 12 сарын хугацаанд төлөх ёстой нийт дүнг зээлдэгчийн нэрээр харуулна уу.
sql_query: WITH latest_version_cte AS (SELECT acnt_code, MAX(nrs_version) AS max_ver FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL GROUP BY acnt_code) SELECT t.customer_name, t.cur_code, SUM(t.amount + t.int_amount) AS total_due FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL t JOIN latest_version_cte lv ON t.acnt_code = lv.acnt_code AND t.nrs_version = lv.max_ver WHERE t.status = 'O' AND t.schd_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND t.schd_date < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), 12) GROUP BY t.customer_name, t.cur_code ORDER BY total_due DESC
notes: Aggregate by customer and currency - must GROUP BY cur_code for correct totals.

user_question: ТАВАН БОГД ХХК-ийн зээлийн төлбөрийн хуваарийг харуул
sql_query: WITH target_loans AS (SELECT DISTINCT acnt_code FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE UPPER(customer_name) = UPPER('ТАВАН БОГД ХХК') AND txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O'), latest_version_cte AS (SELECT acnt_code, MAX(nrs_version) AS max_ver FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL WHERE acnt_code IN (SELECT acnt_code FROM target_loans) GROUP BY acnt_code) SELECT t.acnt_code, t.schd_date, t.amount, t.int_amount, t.theor_bal, t.cur_code FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL t JOIN latest_version_cte lv ON t.acnt_code = lv.acnt_code AND t.nrs_version = lv.max_ver WHERE t.status = 'O' AND t.schd_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY t.schd_date ASC
notes: Customer schedule - ALWAYS use UPPER() for text matching to handle case differences.

user_question: MNT валютаар олгосон зээлүүдийн ойрын 90 хоногийн төлбөрийн нийт хүүний дүнг тооцоол
sql_query: WITH latest_version_cte AS (SELECT acnt_code, MAX(nrs_version) AS max_ver FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL WHERE cur_code = 'MNT' GROUP BY acnt_code) SELECT SUM(t.int_amount) AS total_interest_due FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL t JOIN latest_version_cte lv ON t.acnt_code = lv.acnt_code AND t.nrs_version = lv.max_ver WHERE t.status = 'O' AND t.cur_code = 'MNT' AND t.schd_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND t.schd_date < TRUNC(SYSDATE) + 90
notes: MNT only - filter by cur_code in both CTE and main query.

user_question: Ирэх 6 сарын хугацаанд төлөх ёстой нийт зээлийн үндсэн дүнг гаргаж өг
sql_query: WITH latest_version_cte AS (SELECT acnt_code, MAX(nrs_version) AS max_ver FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL GROUP BY acnt_code) SELECT t.cur_code, SUM(t.amount) AS total_principal_due FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL t JOIN latest_version_cte lv ON t.acnt_code = lv.acnt_code AND t.nrs_version = lv.max_ver WHERE t.status = 'O' AND t.schd_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND t.schd_date < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), 6) GROUP BY t.cur_code ORDER BY t.cur_code
notes: GROUP BY cur_code - can't sum different currencies.

user_question: Ирэх 6 сарын хугацаанд төлөх ёстой нийт зээлийн хүүний төлбөрийн дүнг гаргаж өг
sql_query: WITH latest_version_cte AS (SELECT acnt_code, MAX(nrs_version) AS max_ver FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL GROUP BY acnt_code) SELECT t.cur_code, SUM(t.int_amount) AS total_interest_due FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL t JOIN latest_version_cte lv ON t.acnt_code = lv.acnt_code AND t.nrs_version = lv.max_ver WHERE t.status = 'O' AND t.schd_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND t.schd_date < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE), 6) GROUP BY t.cur_code ORDER BY t.cur_code
notes: Same as above but for interest.

user_question: 3600008989 дасны дугаартай зээлийн мэдээлэл болон дараагийн төлөлтийн хуваарийг харуул
sql_query: WITH latest_snapshot AS (SELECT * FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE acnt_code = '3600008989' AND txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL)), current_version AS (SELECT MAX(nrs_version) AS latest_nrs_version FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL WHERE acnt_code = '3600008989'), next_payment AS (SELECT t.schd_date, t.amount, t.int_amount FROM DBM.BCOM_NRS_DETAIL t WHERE t.acnt_code = '3600008989' AND t.nrs_version = (SELECT latest_nrs_version FROM current_version) AND t.status = 'O' AND t.schd_date > SYSDATE ORDER BY t.schd_date ASC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY) SELECT ls.acnt_code, ls.customer_name, ls.principal, ls.cur_code, ls.status, np.schd_date AS next_payment_date, np.amount AS next_principal_amount, np.int_amount AS next_interest_amount FROM latest_snapshot ls LEFT JOIN next_payment np ON 1=1
notes: Combined query pattern - account info + next payment in one query.

user_question: Нээлттэй зээлийн үлдэгдэлүүдийг эрсдэлийн сангаар цэвэршүүлээд харуул
sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, customer_name, principal, impairment_per, cur_code, principal * (1 - NVL(impairment_per, 0) / 100) AS net_principal, txn_date FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND principal > 0 ORDER BY net_principal DESC
notes: Current open loans with net principal calculation - global snapshot with status='O'.

user_question: Нийт хэдэн хэвийн зээл байна вэ?
sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS normal_loan_count FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND class_name = 'ХЭВИЙН'
notes: Simple count - global snapshot with status='O' and class filter.

sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, customer_name, acnt_name, principal, cur_code, class_name, txn_date FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND UPPER(class_name) IN ('ХЭВИЙН БУС', 'ЭРГЭЛЗЭЭТЭЙ', 'МУУ') ORDER BY principal DESC
notes: Non-performing loans - current state with classification filter.

sql_query: SELECT cur_code, SUM(principal) AS total_nonperforming_principal FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND UPPER(class_name) IN ('ХЭВИЙН БУС', 'ЭРГЭЛЗЭЭТЭЙ', 'МУУ') GROUP BY cur_code ORDER BY cur_code
notes: Aggregated NPL by currency.

user_question: Болор шүрийн нээлттэй дансны хугацаа хэтрэлтийг жил сар өдрөөр илэрхийлвэл, бас ангилал?
sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, acnt_name, customer_name, due_princ_days, class_name, CASE WHEN due_princ_days > 0 THEN TRUNC(due_princ_days / 365) ELSE 0 END AS overdue_years, CASE WHEN due_princ_days > 0 THEN TRUNC(MOD(due_princ_days, 365) / 30) ELSE 0 END AS overdue_months, CASE WHEN due_princ_days > 0 THEN MOD(MOD(due_princ_days, 365), 30) ELSE 0 END AS overdue_days FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND UPPER(customer_name) LIKE '%БОЛОР ШҮР%'
notes: Customer lookup with overdue calculation - global snapshot.

user_question: Болор шүрийн нээлттэй зээлийг хэзээ олгосон, хэн хариуцдаг вэ?
sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, customer_name, adv_date, adv_amount, cur_code, account_manager_name FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND UPPER(customer_name) LIKE '%БОЛОР ШҮР%' AND adv_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY adv_date DESC
notes: Customer's open loans with manager info.

user_question: Нээлттэй зээлийн үлдэгдэл валют тус бүрээр
sql_query: SELECT cur_code, SUM(principal) AS total_outstanding_principal, COUNT(*) AS loan_count FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND principal > 0 GROUP BY cur_code ORDER BY cur_code
notes: Total balance by currency - global snapshot aggregation.

sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, acnt_name, customer_name, principal, cur_code, txn_date FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND cur_code = 'EUR' AND status = 'O' AND principal > 0 ORDER BY principal DESC
notes: EUR loans - simple filter on global snapshot.

sql_query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT customer_name) AS active_borrower_count FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND customer_name IS NOT NULL AND principal > 0
notes: Distinct customer count - global snapshot.

sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS num_loan_accounts_with_balance FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND principal > 0 AND status = 'O'
notes: Account count with positive balance - no status filter as question asks about balance, not status.

sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, acnt_name, customer_name, principal, cur_code, txn_date FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND principal > 0 AND UPPER(customer_name) LIKE '%ЦЭЦЭНС%';
notes: Customer's active loans - global snapshot with status filter.

user_question: Цэцэнс-ийн бүх зээлийн гол мэдээллүүдийг хүснэгтээр гаргъя
sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, acnt_name, customer_name, principal, cur_code, class_name, status, adv_date, adv_amount, txn_date FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND UPPER(customer_name) LIKE '%ЦЭЦЭНС%' ORDER BY status, adv_date DESC
notes: ALL loans (active and closed) - no status filter since 'бүх' means all.

sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, acnt_name, customer_name, account_manager_name, cur_code, principal, adv_amount, adv_date, status, txn_date FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND principal > 0 AND UPPER(account_manager_name) LIKE '%ГҮРБАЗАР%' ORDER BY adv_date DESC NULLS LAST
notes: Manager's active loans - global snapshot with manager filter.

sql_query: SELECT account_manager_name, COUNT(*) AS active_loan_count FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND principal > 0 AND UPPER(account_manager_name) LIKE '%МӨНХЦЭЦЭГ%' GROUP BY account_manager_name
notes: Manager's loan count - global snapshot aggregation.

user_question: Дулааны цахилгаан станцын зээлүүд бүгд төгрөгөөр өгсөн үү?
sql_query: SELECT cur_code, COUNT(*) AS loan_count FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND (UPPER(customer_name) LIKE '%ДЦС%' OR UPPER(acnt_name) LIKE '%ДЦС%') GROUP BY cur_code;
notes: Currency distribution check - shows if all loans are MNT or not.

sql_query: SELECT cur_code, SUM(principal) AS total_principal_balance FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' GROUP BY cur_code ORDER BY cur_code
notes: Total balance by currency - current state only (status='O').

sql_query: WITH customer_totals AS (SELECT cust_code, customer_name, SUM(principal * rate) AS total_balance_in_mnt FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND principal > 0 AND customer_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY cust_code, customer_name) SELECT cust_code, customer_name, total_balance_in_mnt FROM customer_totals ORDER BY total_balance_in_mnt DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
notes: Top 5 customers by balance - convert to MNT for cross-currency comparison.

user_question: Хамгийн өндөр зээлтэй 5 зээлийн дансыг харуул
sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, acnt_name, customer_name, cur_code, principal, (principal * rate) AS balance_in_mnt FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND principal > 0 ORDER BY balance_in_mnt DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
notes: Top 5 accounts by balance - convert to MNT for ranking.

user_question: Хамгийн өндөр олголт хийсэн 5 зээлийн дансыг харуул
sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, acnt_name, customer_name, cur_code, adv_date, adv_amount, (adv_amount * rate) AS adv_amount_in_mnt FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND adv_amount > 0 AND (acnt_name IS NOT NULL OR customer_name IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY adv_amount_in_mnt DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY
notes: Top 5 by disbursement - historical measure, no status filter. Uses MNT conversion for ranking.

sql_query: WITH customer_totals AS ( SELECT cust_code, customer_name, SUM(adv_amount * rate) AS total_adv_in_mnt, LISTAGG(adv_date || ': ' || adv_amount || ' ' || cur_code || ' (' || (adv_amount * rate) || ' MNT)', '; ') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY adv_date DESC) AS account_details FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND adv_amount > 0 AND customer_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY cust_code, customer_name ) SELECT cust_code, customer_name, total_adv_in_mnt, account_details FROM customer_totals ORDER BY total_adv_in_mnt DESC FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY;
notes: Top 5 customers by total disbursement - aggregate per customer, convert to MNT. -customer's all accounts shown in details.

sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, acnt_name, customer_name, status, principal, cur_code, project_name FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND UPPER(customer_name) = UPPER('ПИРАМИД-ОРД ХХК') ORDER BY status, acnt_code
notes: Customer's all accounts - ALWAYS use UPPER() for text matching.

sql_query: SELECT cur_code, SUM(int_rcv) AS total_accrued_interest, SUM(int_rcv * rate) AS total_accrued_interest_mnt FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND int_rcv > 0 GROUP BY cur_code ORDER BY total_accrued_interest_mnt DESC
notes: Accrued interest (int_rcv) by currency, converted to MNT. int_rcv = хуримтлагдсан хүү.

sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS loan_count_with_balance FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND principal > 0 AND status = 'O'
notes: Count of loans with positive principal balance - global snapshot.

user_question: 2025 онд хийгдсэн нийт үндсэн төлөлтийн дүн

notes: Aggregate principal payments by currency. Always GROUP BY cur_code when summing amounts.

sql_query: SELECT txn_jrno, txn_date, acnt_code, txn_code, txn_amount, cur_code FROM DBM.LOAN_TXN WHERE txn_date = TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY txn_jrno
notes: All transactions today. TRUNC(SYSDATE) = today without time component.

sql_query: WITH customer_accounts AS (SELECT DISTINCT acnt_code FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE UPPER(customer_name) LIKE '%МИАТ%' AND txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL)) SELECT t.txn_jrno, t.txn_date, t.acnt_code, t.txn_code, t.txn_amount, t.cur_code FROM DBM.LOAN_TXN t WHERE t.acnt_code IN (SELECT acnt_code FROM customer_accounts) AND t.txn_code IN ('PAY_PRINC', 'PAY_INT', 'PAY_FINE') ORDER BY t.txn_date DESC
notes: CRITICAL PATTERN: To get customer's transactions, first find their acnt_codes from loan_balance_detail, then query loan_txn. Always use UPPER() for customer name matching.

sql_query: SELECT txn_code, cur_code, SUM(txn_amount) AS total_amount, COUNT(*) AS txn_count FROM DBM.LOAN_TXN WHERE txn_date >= TO_DATE('01-01-2025', 'DD-MM-YYYY') GROUP BY txn_code, cur_code ORDER BY txn_code, cur_code
notes: Transaction summary by type and currency. Useful for overall transaction analysis.

user_question: Сүүлийн 7 хоногт хамгийн их төлөлт хийсэн данс
sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, cur_code, SUM(txn_amount) AS total_paid FROM DBM.LOAN_TXN WHERE txn_code IN ('PAY_PRINC', 'PAY_INT') AND txn_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 7 GROUP BY acnt_code, cur_code ORDER BY SUM(txn_amount * currate) DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
notes: Highest paying account in last 7 days. Use currate for cross-currency comparison when ranking.

user_question: Зээлийн валют нь төгрөг рүү хөрвөсөн мэдээлэл байна уу?

notes: Foreign currency loans converted to MNT. No status filter to show all (including closed). link_acnt_codes contains original currency info.

notes: Specific currency conversion: USD to MNT. Filter link_acnt_codes for specific original currency.

user_question: EUR валютаас төгрөг рүү шилжсэн зээлийн мэдээлэл
sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, acnt_name, customer_name, principal, cur_code, link_acnt_codes, adv_date FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND cur_code = 'MNT' AND link_acnt_codes LIKE '%EUR%' ORDER BY adv_date DESC

user_question: 2020 оноос өмнөх хугацаанд гадаад валютын үлдэгдэлтэй байсан боловч одоо төгрөгийн зээлийн үлдэгдэлтэй зээлийн мэдээллийг харуул
sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, acnt_name, customer_name, principal, cur_code, link_acnt_codes, adv_date, adv_amount FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND cur_code = 'MNT' AND link_acnt_codes IS NOT NULL AND (link_acnt_codes LIKE '%USD%' OR link_acnt_codes LIKE '%EUR%' OR link_acnt_codes LIKE '%JPY%' OR link_acnt_codes LIKE '%CNY%') AND adv_date < TO_DATE('01-01-2020', 'DD-MM-YYYY') AND status = 'O' AND principal > 0 ORDER BY adv_date ASC
notes: Historical currency conversion: Loans disbursed before 2020 that were originally foreign currency but now MNT. Combines date filter with link_acnt_codes check.

user_question: Төгрөг рүү хөрвүүлсэн зээлүүдийн нийт үлдэгдэл
sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS converted_loan_count, SUM(principal) AS total_principal_mnt FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.LOAN_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND cur_code = 'MNT' AND link_acnt_codes IS NOT NULL AND (link_acnt_codes LIKE '%USD%' OR link_acnt_codes LIKE '%EUR%' OR link_acnt_codes LIKE '%JPY%' OR link_acnt_codes LIKE '%CNY%') AND status = 'O' AND principal > 0
notes: Aggregate statistics for converted loans. Count and total balance of loans converted to MNT.

user_question: Энэ онд төлөгдөх ёстой үлдсэн үндсэн зээлийн дүнг валютаар нь харуул
sql_query: WITH latest_version_cte AS ( SELECT acnt_code, MAX(nrs_version) AS max_ver FROM dbm.bcom_nrs_detail GROUP BY acnt_code ), scheduled_principal AS ( SELECT t.cur_code, SUM(t.amount) AS total_scheduled_principal FROM dbm.bcom_nrs_detail t INNER JOIN latest_version_cte lv ON t.acnt_code = lv.acnt_code AND t.nrs_version = lv.max_ver WHERE t.status = 'O' AND t.schd_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND t.schd_date <= LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), 11)) GROUP BY t.cur_code ), paid_principal AS ( SELECT cur_code, SUM(txn_amount) AS total_paid_principal FROM dbm.loan_txn WHERE txn_code = 'PAY_PRINC' AND txn_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND txn_date <= LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), 11)) GROUP BY cur_code ) SELECT s.cur_code, COALESCE(s.total_scheduled_principal, 0) AS total_scheduled_principal, COALESCE(p.total_paid_principal, 0) AS total_paid_principal, COALESCE(s.total_scheduled_principal, 0) - COALESCE(p.total_paid_principal, 0) AS remaining_principal_due FROM scheduled_principal s LEFT JOIN paid_principal p ON s.cur_code = p.cur_code ORDER BY s.cur_code;
notes: Due principal this year - due_princ_amt column. Filter by current year using EXTRACT(YEAR FROM adv_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE).

user_question: Энэ онд төлөгдөх ёстой үлдсэн үндсэн зээлийн дүнг харуул
sql_query: WITH latest_version_cte AS ( SELECT acnt_code, MAX(nrs_version) AS max_ver FROM dbm.bcom_nrs_detail GROUP BY acnt_code ), scheduled_principal AS ( SELECT t.cur_code, SUM(t.amount) AS total_scheduled_principal FROM dbm.bcom_nrs_detail t INNER JOIN latest_version_cte lv ON t.acnt_code = lv.acnt_code AND t.nrs_version = lv.max_ver WHERE t.status = 'O' AND t.schd_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND t.schd_date <= LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), 11)) GROUP BY t.cur_code ), paid_principal AS ( SELECT cur_code, SUM(txn_amount) AS total_paid_principal FROM dbm.loan_txn WHERE txn_code = 'PAY_PRINC' AND txn_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND txn_date <= LAST_DAY(ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), 11)) GROUP BY cur_code ) SELECT s.cur_code, COALESCE(s.total_scheduled_principal, 0) AS total_scheduled_principal, COALESCE(p.total_paid_principal, 0) AS total_paid_principal, COALESCE(s.total_scheduled_principal, 0) - COALESCE(p.total_paid_principal, 0) AS remaining_principal_due FROM scheduled_principal s LEFT JOIN paid_principal p ON s.cur_code = p.cur_code ORDER BY s.cur_code;
notes: Due principal this year - due_princ_amt column. Filter by current year using EXTRACT(YEAR FROM adv_date) = EXTRACT(YEAR FROM SYSDATE).

user_question: Бүх үнэт цаасны мэдээллийг харуулна уу
sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, acnt_name, security_code, customer_name, book_value, net_amount, cur_code, status, invest_type, prod_type FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' ORDER BY (net_amount * rate) DESC
notes: All active securities - use global snapshot pattern with status='O' filter.

sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, security_code, customer_name, deal_date, net_amount, cur_code, int_rate, end_date, prod_name FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND prod_type = 'BANK_PORTFOLIO' AND buy_sell = 'B' AND status = 'O' ORDER BY deal_date DESC
notes: Securities bought by bank - filter by prod_type='BANK_PORTFOLIO' and buy_sell='B'.

sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, acnt_name, security_code, customer_name, net_amount, cur_code, int_rate, start_date, end_date, prod_name FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND prod_type = 'ISSUER_PORTFOLIO' AND buy_sell = 'S' ORDER BY start_date DESC
notes: Bonds/securities issued by bank - filter by prod_type='ISSUER_PORTFOLIO' and buy_sell='S'.

sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, security_code, acnt_name, customer_name, end_date, net_amount, cur_code, int_rate, status FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND end_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY') AND end_date < ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'YYYY'), 12) ORDER BY end_date ASC
notes: Securities maturing this year - filter by end_date within current year.

user_question: Үнэт цаасны нийт дүнг валютаар нь харуул
sql_query: SELECT cur_code, SUM(book_value) AS total_book_value, SUM(net_amount) AS total_net_amount, COUNT(*) AS security_count FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' GROUP BY cur_code ORDER BY SUM(net_amount * rate) DESC
notes: Total securities by currency - aggregate with GROUP BY cur_code.

sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, security_code, acnt_name, customer_name, net_amount, cur_code, deal_date, int_rate, status, prod_type FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND UPPER(customer_name) LIKE UPPER('%МОНГОЛ БАНК%') ORDER BY deal_date DESC
notes: Search securities by counterparty name - use UPPER() for case-insensitive matching.

sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, security_code, customer_name, net_amount, cur_code, int_rate, start_date, end_date, status FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND invest_type = 'H' AND status = 'O' ORDER BY end_date ASC
notes: Held-to-maturity securities - filter by invest_type='H'.

sql_query: SELECT security_code, customer_name, acnt_name, int_inc, int_rate, cur_code, net_amount FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND int_inc > 0 ORDER BY (int_inc * rate) DESC

sql_query: SELECT acnt_code, security_code, customer_name, deal_date, net_amount, cur_code, deal_status, status FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.SECURITY_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND (status = 'C' OR deal_status = 'C') ORDER BY deal_date DESC
notes: Closed securities/deals - filter by status='C' or deal_status='C'.

sql_query: SELECT 'БАЙРШУУЛСАН' AS type, acnt_code, acnt_name, cust_name, principal, cur_code, int_rate, maturity_date, module FROM DBM.PLACEMENT_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.PLACEMENT_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND principal > 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'ТАТСАН' AS type, acnt_code, acnt_name, cust_name, principal, cur_code, int_rate, maturity_date, module FROM DBM.BORROWING_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.BORROWING_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND principal > 0 ORDER BY type, 5 DESC

user_question: Модуль тус бүрийн нийт татсан эх үүсвэр
sql_query: SELECT module, CASE WHEN module = 'LD' THEN 'Зээл' WHEN module = 'MM' THEN 'Хадгаламж' ELSE module END AS module_name, cur_code, SUM(principal) AS total_principal, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM DBM.BORROWING_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.BORROWING_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND status = 'O' AND principal > 0 GROUP BY module, cur_code ORDER BY module, SUM(principal * rate) DESC

sql_query: SELECT deal_code, customer_name, prod_type, buy_sell, buy_amount, buy_cur_code, sell_amount, sell_cur_code, deal_rate, deal_status, deal_date FROM DBM.FX_DEAL_DETAIL WHERE deal_status NOT IN ('C', 'D') ORDER BY deal_date DESC
notes: FX deals - use FX_DEAL_DETAIL for deal definitions. deal_status: N=New, S=Started, SF=Finished, C=Closed, D=Cancelled.

sql_query: SELECT deal_code, customer_name, prod_type, buy_sell, buy_amount, buy_cur_code, sell_amount, sell_cur_code, deal_rate, profit_loss, dealer_name FROM DBM.FX_DEAL_DETAIL WHERE deal_status NOT IN ('C', 'D') ORDER BY deal_date DESC
notes: Active FX deals with profit/loss and dealer info.

sql_query: SELECT deal_code, customer_name, buy_sell, buy_amount, buy_cur_code, sell_amount, sell_cur_code, deal_rate, profit_loss, dealer_name, deal_date FROM DBM.FX_DEAL_DETAIL WHERE prod_type = 'SPOT' AND deal_status NOT IN ('C', 'D') ORDER BY deal_date DESC
notes: SPOT deals only - filter by prod_type = 'SPOT'.

sql_query: SELECT deal_code, swap_code, customer_name, buy_sell, buy_amount, buy_cur_code, sell_amount, sell_cur_code, deal_rate, swap_give_int, swap_take_int, leg_number FROM DBM.FX_DEAL_DETAIL WHERE is_swap = 1 AND deal_status NOT IN ('C', 'D') ORDER BY deal_date DESC
notes: SWAP deals only - filter by is_swap = 1. Swap deals may have 2 legs (leg_number 1 and 2).

sql_query: SELECT deal_code, customer_name, buy_sell, buy_amount, buy_cur_code, sell_amount, sell_cur_code, deal_rate, profit_loss, buy_date, sell_date FROM DBM.FX_DEAL_DETAIL WHERE prod_type = 'FORWARD' AND deal_status NOT IN ('C', 'D') ORDER BY deal_date DESC
notes: FORWARD deals only - filter by prod_type = 'FORWARD'.

sql_query: SELECT deal_code, prod_type, buy_sell, buy_amount, buy_cur_code, sell_amount, sell_cur_code, deal_rate, deal_date, deal_status FROM DBM.FX_DEAL_DETAIL WHERE UPPER(customer_name) LIKE UPPER('%МОНГОЛ БАНК%') ORDER BY deal_date DESC
notes: FX deals with specific counterparty - use UPPER for case-insensitive search.

sql_query: SELECT prod_type, SUM(profit_loss) AS total_profit_loss, COUNT(*) AS deal_count FROM DBM.FX_DEAL_DETAIL WHERE deal_status NOT IN ('D') GROUP BY prod_type ORDER BY SUM(profit_loss) DESC
notes: FX profit/loss by product type. Excludes cancelled (D) deals.

sql_query: SELECT dealer_name, COUNT(*) AS deal_count, SUM(profit_loss) AS total_profit_loss FROM DBM.FX_DEAL_DETAIL WHERE deal_status NOT IN ('C', 'D') GROUP BY dealer_name ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
notes: FX deals grouped by dealer.

sql_query: SELECT deal_code, swap_code, customer_name, buy_amount_bal, sell_amount_bal, int_rcv, int_pay, profit_loss, days_to_maturity, deal_status FROM DBM.FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND deal_status NOT IN ('C', 'D') ORDER BY days_to_maturity ASC
notes: Swap daily balances - use FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL. Only swap deals have entries here.

sql_query: SELECT deal_code, customer_name, int_rcv, int_pay, swap_give_int_rate, swap_take_int_rate, deal_status FROM DBM.FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND (int_rcv > 0 OR int_pay > 0) ORDER BY int_rcv DESC
notes: Swap interest accruals - int_rcv = receivable, int_pay = payable.

sql_query: SELECT deal_code, customer_name, reval_asset, reval_liability, reval_inc, reval_exp, last_reval_date FROM DBM.FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND deal_status NOT IN ('C', 'D') ORDER BY reval_inc DESC
notes: Swap revaluation - reval_inc = income, reval_exp = expense.

sql_query: SELECT deal_code, customer_name, days_to_maturity, buy_amount_bal, sell_amount_bal, profit_loss, deal_status FROM DBM.FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND days_to_maturity <= 30 AND days_to_maturity > 0 AND deal_status NOT IN ('C', 'D') ORDER BY days_to_maturity ASC
notes: Swaps maturing in next 30 days - filter by days_to_maturity.

sql_query: SELECT deal_code, customer_name, buy_amount_off, sell_amount_off, buy_cur_code, sell_cur_code FROM DBM.FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND (buy_amount_off > 0 OR sell_amount_off > 0) ORDER BY buy_amount_off DESC
notes: Off-balance sheet swap positions.

sql_query: SELECT SUM(profit_loss) AS total_profit_loss, COUNT(DISTINCT deal_code) AS deal_count FROM DBM.FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL WHERE txn_date = (SELECT MAX(txn_date) FROM DBM.FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL) AND deal_status NOT IN ('C', 'D')
notes: Total swap profit/loss from FX_SWAP_BALANCE_DETAIL.
